component.name: Cairo QML Clock
component.summary: A cairo-clock replacement built with Qt6 QML

description.p: A modern reimplementation of MacSlow's cairo-clock using Qt6 QML. Runs on modern Linux systems without deprecated dependencies. Features smooth sweep second hand, multiple themes, and draggable window on both X11 and Wayland.
On X11: sticky workspace support and taskbar hiding included. On Wayland: dragging works, sticky workspace not supported.

screenshot.caption: Three clock themes on a twilight desktop
